about.title: ABOUT LIVEMAKERS
about.intro: LiveMakers is a field-precision intelligence terminal for the components of next-generation finance: the AI agent economy, crypto assets, on-chain decentralized finance (DeFi), and AI auto-trading. We anchor our observations in Cardano and Midnight, and frame them within the broader multi-blockchain era.
about.audiencesTitle: Practice and research, from the same primary data
about.audiencesLifestyle: For individual investors and practitioners who want to read the next move themselves — the components of next-generation finance (AI agent economy, DeFi, AI auto-trading, decentralized governance) are no longer a professionals-only domain. LiveMakers organizes leading-indicator signals and live data into concrete, actionable decisions: wallet operation, DeFi participation, AI auto-trading deployment, and governance voting.
about.audiencesInstitutional: For institutional researchers and research professionals, the same work is delivered as a structured Weekly Brief every Friday at 12:00 JST. SITION Group operates Cardano DRep #13, three stake pools (SIPO/SIPO2/SIPO3), and is a Midnight Ambassador as of April 2026 — meaning our analysis is grounded in the day-to-day numbers and decision logic of someone actually running governance, nodes, and ecosystem implementation. Institutional readers consume the same primary data that individual practitioners use, at a different granularity.
about.whyBody1: Cardano is one of the most mature chains for decentralized governance, stake pool economics, and institutional-grade smart contract implementation. Midnight is a pragmatic bridge to institutional adoption, combining zero-knowledge privacy with regulatory compatibility.
about.whyBody2: That said, we operate in a multi-blockchain era. Cardano and Midnight serve as our observation axis, but we continuously benchmark against Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and other major L1/L2 movements.
about.processBody: Every LiveMakers brief is grounded in primary data continuously aggregated and evaluated by the SITION Discovery Engine (SDE) — our proprietary AI-driven intelligence pipeline. Koios, CoinGecko, DefiLlama, GitHub, X, and other sources feed the engine in real time, and the output is contextualized through our SIPO (Stake In Pool Operator) operational experience. This is how we sustain both research precision and actionable decisions for investors.
about.sipoStats: Cardano DRep #13 — ₳101M delegated, ranked 13th. Three Cardano stake pools (SIPO / SIPO2 / SIPO3) — ₳114M delegated in total. Midnight Ambassador since April 2026. (As of April 12, 2026.)
about.sipoBody: We are observers and participants at the same time — what we share is a continuation of decisions we make every day in our own operations.
about.disclaimerBody: Not investment advice. Information provided for learning and research.
